mapper.insert: INSERT INTO interview_problems (report_id, round_number, question, answer, expression_analysis_id, accuracy_evaluation_id) VALUES (#{reportId}, #{roundNumber}, #{question}, #{answer}, #{expressionAnalysisId}, #{accuracyEvaluationId})
mapper.select: SELECT report_id, round_number, question, answer, accuracy_evaluation_id, expression_analysis_id FROM interview_problems WHERE report_id = #{reportId}
